summary: Comprehensive testing of 5 new TTRPG features: Rest Panel, Backstory Tab, Initiative Tracker, Session Timer, and Quick NPC Generator. All features working correctly. Backend tests passed (7/7). Frontend UI testing verified all components render and function as expected.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test character Test_Orc_Wiz (a1e7babc-c582-48ec-8a64-8c71501fa281) and campaign (b51ba0e9-5b08-44ed-b3dd-4a97dd2a09f6)
context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 new features fully tested and working: 1) Rest Panel in Combat tab with Short/Long Rest buttons and hit dice selector, 2) Backstory Tab with 7 editable fields (Personality Traits, Ideals, Bonds, Flaws, Backstory, Allies & Organizations, Appearance), 3) Initiative Tracker in GM Combat tab with add combatant, Roll All, Start Combat, Next Turn functionality, 4) Session Timer in GM header with play/pause/reset controls, 5) Quick NPC Generator in GM NPCs tab generating name, race, occupation, personality, voice, quirk, and motivation.

rest_panel.short_rest_button: PASS - Blue button with 'Hit dice + short-rest resources' text
rest_panel.long_rest_button: PASS - Green button with 'Full HP, slots, all resources' text
rest_panel.expandable_panel: PASS - REST panel shows hit dice remaining (1/1 HD)

backstory_tab.allies_organizations: PASS - Field visible with Edit button
backstory_tab.appearance: PASS - Field visible with Edit button
backstory_tab.backend_integration: PASS - PATCH /api/characters/{id} with backstory object working

initiative_tracker.location: GM Screen > Combat Tab (below Combat Control)

initiative_tracker.hp_bars: PASS - HP bars with +/- adjustment buttons

generated_fields.motivation: PASS - e.g., 'searching for a lost sibling'

existing_features_verified.gm_screen_tabs: PASS - All 13 tabs accessible (Combat, Location, NPCs, NPC Network, Monsters, Tables, Loot, Dice, Party, Notes, Story Arcs, AI Planner, Soundboard)
